meta_title: Man and Van Seaford | Affordable Man with a Van Service

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Man and Van in Seaford

For smaller moves, our man and van service offers the best value for money whilst never compromising on quality.

How can we help you today?

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage  

We are an independent and local moving company working predominantly within the Seaford, Newhaven and Brighton area. Alongside our removals offering, we also provide a man and van service for customers with smaller moving requirements. Providing the best value for money, our man with a van service has assisted many clients as both a home moving option and a delivery and collection method. Not only for domestic clients, it also utilised by businesses for office moves and a single item collection and delivery service.

Unfortunately, you hear many stories of man and van offerings letting people down at the last minute, or not providing the service they originally promised. This is one of the reasons our man and van service is so popular, known for our professionalism and reliability and also being a long standing removals company, customers feel safe in the knowledge that we will not let them down. Our team work to the same professional standards, whether they are undertaking a man and van job or a full removals and packing service. All moving vans are fully equipped with GPS, loading ramps, furniture covers, van tie racks and much more - your possessions will be safe and secure when using Mark Ratcliffe's man and van service.

What are the costs of a man and van service in Seaford?

Affordability is what makes our man with a van service so attractive to many customers. Rather than adding different prices for distances etc, we make it simple: 

  • ‍Man and Van with working driver - £70 per hour
  • ‍Man and Van with driver only - £50 per hour (you load and unload the van)

Prices are inclusive of vat and fuel (within the local area) with no additional charges for weekend moving.

Friendly, down to earth team who put their customers first

We are immensely proud of our reputation for high quality service. Why not take a lot at some of the reviews previous clients have left regarding our range of services on our testimonials page. If you would like additional information regarding our man and van, removals, packing, storage or overseas removals - our friendly team are always happy to help. Simply call us on 01323 848 008 or for a free quote, fill out the online form by clicking the "Request a Quote" button at the top of this page.

‍
